name: Customer Order Management
justification: Comarch ERP XL natively supports sales orders and their statuses in the sales module. This description covers the typical document lifecycle without the need for additional logic.

name: Purchase Requisition
justification: By default, the system supports purchase requisitions and purchase orders, as well as their approval workflow within procurement processes. Automatic conversion to a purchase order is handled by standard mechanisms.

name: Stock Management
justification: Comarch ERP XL provides standard functionality for tracking inventory levels, reservations, locations, and inventory movements. This requirement falls within typical inventory management functionality.

name: Accounts Payable
justification: The system standard covers accounts payable, accounts receivable, payments, settlements, and posting documents to the general ledger. The description does not indicate a need for non-standard logic.

name: Accounts Receivable
justification: The system standard covers accounts payable, accounts receivable, payments, settlements, and posting documents to the general ledger. The description does not indicate a need for custom logic.

name: Production Planning
justification: Production planning is carried out using the standard ERP XL production modules, based on demand, orders, and material availability. The requirement does not go beyond the standard.

name: Preventive Maintenance
justification: The system includes standard mechanisms for planning inspections and maintenance tasks. This requirement describes a typical maintenance schedule.

name: Employee Management
justification: The HR module typically stores employee data, organizational structures, and employment history. This corresponds to a basic personnel file.

name: Business Intelligence Dashboard
justification: Standard ERP XL reports and dashboards enable KPI summaries, charts, and drill-down analyses. This requirement falls within the reporting scope without the need for additional code.

name: Role-Based Access Control
justification: Role- and group-based access control is a standard feature of the system administrator. This requirement does not require any extensions.
